description: Generate structured Markdown context from project files for AI assistant interactions
command.generate.title: Generate AI Context
command.generate.clipboard.title: Generate AI Context to Clipboard
command.generate.file.title: Generate AI Context to File
command.generate.preview.title: Generate AI Context to Preview
command.configure.title: Configure AI Context Generator
command.openLogs.title: Open AI Context Generator Logs
command.generate.ignoreFile.title: Generate .aicontextignore File
command.toggleLargeFileDegradation.title: Toggle Large File Degradation
submenu.config.label: AI Context Generator: Configuration
configuration.title: AI Context Generator
configuration.maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size in bytes before showing outline/summary (minimum: 1, default: 50KB)
configuration.maxTokens.description: Token limit warning threshold for local counting (minimum: 1, does NOT call any AI API)
configuration.textPreviewLength.descript: Maximum number of characters shown in text/document previews and compressed document summaries
configuration.logSampleLines.description: Number of lines to sample from log files per level (minimum: 0)
configuration.csvSampleRows.description: Number of rows to sample from CSV/Excel files (minimum: 0)
configuration.defaultTemplate.descriptio: Default template name to use. Custom templates can be placed in `.ai_context_templates/` folder in your project root.
configuration.sensitiveKeyPatterns.descr: Patterns for detecting sensitive keys in config files (auto-filtered for security)
configuration.autoDetectLanguage.descrip: Automatically detect programming language for syntax highlighting
configuration.ignorePatterns.description: Additional glob patterns to ignore (combined with .aicontextignore). .gitignore is automatically merged when .aicontextignore is generated.
configuration.binaryFilePatterns.descrip: Glob patterns for files to treat as binary and summarize with metadata instead of text content
configuration.outputFileName.description: Output filename when saving to workspace root (directory components are ignored). Existing file will trigger overwrite confirmation.
configuration.showTreeEmoji.description: Show emoji markers on selected files in directory tree
configuration.tokenEstimation.descriptio: Token counting method: tiktoken (accurate) or simple (lightweight)
configuration.parallelFileReads.descript: Maximum number of parallel file read operations (minimum: 1)
configuration.logLevel.description: Log level for output channel (debug, info, warn, error)
configuration.outlineDetail.description: Outline detail. For TS/JS semantic mode: basic (signature + Inputs/Returns only), standard (+ Flow + Calls), detailed (+ side effects/branches/errors). Other languages: symbol outline depth.
configuration.outlineIncludePrivate.desc: Include private members in outline extraction
configuration.outlineExtractComments.des: Extract comments and documentation strings in outline
configuration.outlineMaxItems.descriptio: Maximum number of items per section in outline (10-200)
configuration.enableLargeFileDegradation: Enable size-based degradation for large files (outline/summary instead of full content). Type-specific analyzers may still summarize logs, documents, configs, and data files.
enum.outline.basic: Basic - TS/JS: signature + Inputs/Returns; others: names
enum.outline.standard: Standard - TS/JS: + Flow + Calls; others: parameters and return types
enum.outline.detailed: Detailed - TS/JS: + side effects/branches/errors; others: full symbol info
